_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: β-Tubulin III is a useful marker to corroborate neurofibroma diagnosis. Colocalization of Foxp3 and β-tubulin III was observer in the test eyes next to the injection site while control eyes were found negative for both markers
details: Successfully used as marker to corroborate neurofibroma diagnosis with colocalization with Foxp3 in test eyes
